wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Divine Destiny|2|Name=Divine Destiny}}{{R|Divine Destiny|3=2}} is the Starter Upgrade of the [[Slay the Spire 2:Regent|Regent]]'s {{R|Divine Right|3=2}}. The [[Slay the Spire 2:Stars|Stars]] given are doubled to 6.
<!-- {{{MORE INFORMATION}}} -->



== Sources ==

After fighting a {{2|Bosses|Boss}}, can be obtained by taking the {{R|Touch of Orobas||2}} from {{2|Orobas}}. Replaces {{R|Divine Right|3=2}}.

== Spawn Restrictions ==
Can only be obtained by [[Slay the Spire 2:Regent|Regent]].
